title: Items and Blocks in Paintings
description: Adds paintings of different items. Inspired by Minecraft Story Mode's Endercon scene.
body: Want to Label or Spice up your World? Get this mod, and Have many different paintings, each one being a different item! Download now to get these paintings in your world! All Iron Tools, All Diamond Tools, Diamond, Gold Ingot, Copper Ingot, Quartz, Netherite Scrap, Redstone Dust, Iron Chestplate, All 4 Soups, Golden Apple, Amulet (From MC:SM), Iron Ingot, Amethyst, Tnt Side, Crafting Table Top, Furnace Front (Unlit), Eye of Ender, Exp, Book, Redstone Torch, and Cookie.
